---
title: "Improving issue representation with candidate-level voting advice applications"
author: "Germann, M., Mendez, F., Wheatley, J., Djouvas, C., Nezi, R., and Wall, M."
date: 2025-01-01
description: "European Journal of Political Research, 64(4), 2132–2145. doi: 10.1111/1475-6765.70024"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
